-fx-icon-code.description: Ikonli icon literal. Identifies the icon to render by its pack-qualified literal name (e.g. "fontawesome-home", "material-wifi"). Available literals depend on Ikonli packs present on the classpath.

-fx-icon-size.description: Size of the FontIcon in pixels.

-fx-icon-color.description: Fill color of the FontIcon. Accepts any JavaFX Paint value (named color, hex, rgb/rgba, linear-gradient, radial-gradient).
